rows.label: qev042101_MSG0001
rows.name:
With this, Nalu's life is also over,
mo. Nalu is in despair, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0002
rows.name:
Aah! It is time to say goodbye
to this beautiful land, mo!
Farewell! Farewell, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_JNK0010
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev042101_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask what happened to make
her lament so much.

rows.label: qev042101_JNK0020
rows.name: Tease

rows.label: qev042101_SEL0021
rows.name:
Tease her by asking if she
is practicing for a play.

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0003
rows.name:
It is a sad story, mo... We are
being threatened by the Growth, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0004
rows.name:
Those Growth guys, they said they would
massacre everyone in the caravan...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0005
rows.name:
They told us they would forgive us if we bring
them Deflection Shield Reflectors, Multi-Mirror
Solar Generators, and Hyper Drivers IX, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0006
rows.name:
With Nalu's strength, it is impossible
to gather all of them, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0007
rows.name:
This is not a play, mo! This is
a matter of life and death, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0008
rows.name:
We are being threatened
by the Growth, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0009
rows.name:
Those Growth guys, they said they would
massacre everyone in the caravan...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0010
rows.name:
They told us they would forgive us if we bring
them Deflection Shield Reflectors, Multi-Mirror
Solar Generators, and Hyper Drivers IX, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0011
rows.name:
With Nalu's strength, it is impossible
to gather all of them, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_JNK0030
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev042101_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask the reason why it is impossible.

rows.label: qev042101_JNK0040
rows.name: Shrug

rows.label: qev042101_SEL0041
rows.name:
Tell her you do not understand why
she cannot gather them herself.

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0012
rows.name:
All the necessary items are
located far away from here, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0013
rows.name:
It is impossible for frail little
Nopon Nalu to gather them, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0014
rows.name:
Besides, the items we were told to
gather are all supposedly from the
wreckage of Earthling vehicles, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0015
rows.name:
That is why I am asking you, an
Earthling, mo. I have heard that
Earthlings are very kind, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0016
rows.name:
If we have Deflection Shield Reflectors, Multi-Mirror
Solar Generators, and Hyper Drivers IX, Nalu and
the caravan companions will be saved, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0017
rows.name: Please lend us your strength, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0018
rows.name:
All the necessary items are
located far away from here, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0019
rows.name:
It is impossible for frail little
Nopon Nalu to gather them, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0020
rows.name:
Besides, the items we were told to
gather are all supposedly from the
wreckage of Earthling vehicles, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0021
rows.name:
That is why I am asking you, an
Earthling, mo. I have heard that
Earthlings are very kind, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0022
rows.name:
If we have Deflection Shield Reflectors, Multi-Mirror
Solar Generators, and Hyper Drivers IX, Nalu and
the caravan companions will be saved, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0023
rows.name: Please lend us your strength, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0024
rows.name:
Thank you very much, mo! You are
the savior of the Nopon, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0025
rows.name: I am counting on you, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0026
rows.name:
What I want you to bring are Deflection
Shield Reflectors, Multi-Mirror Solar
Generators, and Hyper Drivers IX, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0027
rows.name:
Without those, only a future of despair
awaits Nalu and the others, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0106
rows.name:
How is it, mo! How is it, mo! Did you
obtain the items I asked for, mo!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0028
rows.name:
Ooh! To bring all of them, what a
deeply merciful person you are, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0029
rows.name:
With this, Nalu and the
Nopon are saved, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0030
rows.name:
Nalu and the others will pass
down the story of you as a
legendary hero from now on, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0031
rows.name:
I will go let everyone in
the caravan know, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0032
rows.name:
Thank you very much, mo. I offer
my heartfelt gratitude, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0033
rows.name:
Gwahahahaha, mo! Earthlings
are such easy marks, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0034
rows.name:
I just cried to them a little, and they
brought me exactly what I asked for, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0035
rows.name:
It sold for a high price to the Growth,
mo! I cannot stop laughing, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0036
rows.name:
...Mo-mo-mo-mo-mo! Did you perhaps
hear what I just said, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_JNK0050
rows.name: Inform

rows.label: qev042101_SEL0051
rows.name:
Tell the truth and say
you heard everything.

rows.label: qev042101_JNK0060
rows.name: Lie

rows.label: qev042101_SEL0061
rows.name: Lie and say you did not hear anything.

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0037
rows.name: You heard it, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0038
rows.name:
What I just said were the flattering
words I spoke when I met the Growth, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0039
rows.name:
I was reflecting on what
pathetic things I said, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0040
rows.name:
The items we received were sold
off to the Growt... No, no! They
were snatched away from us, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0041
rows.name:
Our lives were spared, but the
Growth has actually threatened
this caravan again, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0042
rows.name:
They extorted us, saying they want
even more Earthling items, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0043
rows.name: Mo-mo-mo... We are doomed, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0044
rows.name:
Thank goodness, mo... That
was a close call, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0045
rows.name:
No, it is nothing, mo. ...Actually, the
Growth has threatened us again, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0046
rows.name:
They extorted us, saying they want
even more Earthling items, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0047
rows.name: Mo-mo-mo... We are doomed, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0048
rows.name:
I know this is not something I
can just ask you to do, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0049
rows.name:
Could you please bring us
Earthling items once more, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0050
rows.name:
If you don't... the caravan will
be destroyed by the Growth, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_JNK0070
rows.name: Offer

rows.label: qev042101_SEL0071
rows.name:
Suggest that you fight the Growth
together to break out of this situation.

rows.label: qev042101_JNK0080
rows.name: Suggest

rows.label: qev042101_SEL0081
rows.name:
Tell them that running away
from the Growth is how to
break out of this situation.

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0051
rows.name:
It is impossible with Nopon strength, mo...
That is why we are offering tribute like this,
mo. Please, I need you to help us, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0052
rows.name:
Our enemies are deeply vindictive,
mo. We could never outrun them, mo.
Please, I need you to help us, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0053
rows.name:
I am begging you, mo. Begging,
begging, begging you, mo! You
are our only hope, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_JNK0090
rows.name: Accept

rows.label: qev042101_SEL0091
rows.name: Gather the items one more time.

rows.label: qev042101_JNK0100
rows.name: Consider

rows.label: qev042101_SEL0101
rows.name:
Since this is suspicious, decide
to investigate Nalu first.

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0054
rows.name:
You are actually going to do it,
mo? What a colossal pushover, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0055
rows.name:
No, no, no, no, mo! Those words
just now meant nothing, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0056
rows.name:
I am so grateful, mo! Thank you,
mo! I am counting on you, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0057
rows.name:
What I want you to bring is an Autonomous
AI A-HAB and a Nostalgia L-002, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0058
rows.name: I leave it in your hands, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0059
rows.name:
What are you pondering about, mo?
...Are you not going to help us, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0060
rows.name:
Please obtain an Autonomous
AI A-HAB and a Nostalgia L-002
for everyone's sake, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0061
rows.name: I am counting on you, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0062
rows.name:
What I asked for is an Autonomous AI
A-HAB and a Nostalgia L-002, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0063
rows.name: Please take care of it, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0104
rows.name:
Well then, how is it, mo? Did you
obtain what I asked for, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0064
rows.name: Hooray, mo! With this, I am rich, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0065
rows.name:
Hehehe... Looks like I can squeeze
plenty more out of this Earthling, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0066
rows.name:
I have found a great cash
cow, mo. Earthlings are tools
that generate money, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0067
rows.name:
Gasp! Did Nalu just say something out
loud, mo!? Lately, the stress from
the Growth has been so severe...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0068
rows.name:
I have developed a habit of
speaking in delirium, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0069
rows.name: Anyway, thank you very much, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0087
rows.name:
At this rate, everyone will
be killed by the Growth, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0088
rows.name:
Please bring the items
Nalu asked for, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0105
rows.name:
You came back to us, mo! Now, did
you obtain what Nalu asked for, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0070
rows.name:
To actually bring the requested items...
Just how much of an easy... no, no, no, no!
Just how kind of a person are you, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0071
rows.name:
Thanks to this, our lives are saved,
mo. Thank you so very much, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0072
rows.name:
I imagine you went through a lot
of trouble, mo. Thank you, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0073
rows.name:
Gratitude, gratitude,
and more gratitude, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0074
rows.name: Blush

rows.label: qev042101_JNK0120
rows.name: Feel moved by her joy.

rows.label: qev042101_SEL0121
rows.name: Suspect

rows.label: qev042101_JNK0130
rows.name:
Question her artificially
forced rejoicing.

rows.label: qev042101_SEL0131
rows.name: Uhahahaha!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0075
rows.name:
To actually be moved by
empty words of gratitude...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0076
rows.name:
Deceiving Earthlings is
absolutely irresistible, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0077
rows.name:
...Did Nalu blurt
something out again, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0078
rows.name:
Nalu is so overcome with emotion that
the blood rushed to her head and she
is saying strange things, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0079
rows.name:
Anyway, I will never forget
this for the rest of my life,
mo! [ST:playername ] is Nalu's savior, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0080
rows.name:
What part of Nalu seems artificial,
mo? Nalu is thanking you from the
bottom of her heart, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0081
rows.name:
You have not figured out you
were deceived, have you, mo!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0082
rows.name: No, n-n-nothing, it is nothing, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0083
rows.name: I want you to look into Nalu's eyes, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0084
rows.name:
There is not a single speck of
impurity in these beautiful eyes, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0085
rows.name: Regardless, thank you truly, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042101_MSG0086
rows.name: In any case, thanks![ST:wait ]
